PRODIGAL_GENE_TABLE: per-assembly gene coordinate table produced by Prodigal (fields: gene, contig, start, end, strand, length, ...)
UNIREF_GENE_TAX_TABLE: per-assembly gene annotation table with UniRef100 hits and taxonomic assignments
PRODIGAL_NT: per-assembly nucleotide fasta of predicted genes (headers: gene id)
PRODIGAL_AA: per-assembly amino-acid fasta of predicted genes (headers: gene id)
PRODIGAL_GENE_TABLE_MERGE: merged gene coordinate table across all assemblies
UNIREF_GENE_TAX_TABLE_MERGE: merged gene annotation table with UniRef100 hits and taxonomic assignments across all assemblies
